message:
Fix nested blockquote separator depth and update parity

Glamour:
- Fix block_quote_pending_separator to update when blockquote depth
  decreases, preventing stale high-depth values from nested blockquotes
- This fixes 2 more conformance tests (list_task_list, blockquote_nested)
- Now at 78 pass, 6 skip (was 76 pass, 8 skip)

Bubbles:
- Fix paginator set_total_pages_from_items to reset to 1 page and page 0
  when items is 0 (instead of keeping stale values)
- Fix list cancel_filter to call reset_filter() instead of inline reset
- Add test for cancel filter pagination reset

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
